scripts.dev: bun run dev:server && bun run dev:web
scripts.build:desktop: bun run build:server && bun scripts/prepare-backend-sidecar.mjs && bun run build:desktop:tauri && bun scripts/collect-desktop-artifact.mjs
scripts.build:all: bun run build:desktop && bun run build:android
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run typecheck:shared && bun run typecheck:server && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.check:rust: bun run build:server && bun scripts/prepare-backend-sidecar.mjs && cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/Cargo.toml && cargo check --manifest-path crates/vcam-driver/Cargo.toml
scripts.verify:app: bun run typecheck:all && bun run check:rust
scripts.release:app: bun run install:all && bun run verify:app && bun scripts/release.ts
scripts.release:backend: bun run install:server && bun run verify:backend && bun scripts/release.ts --backend
scripts.release:web: bun run install:web && bun run verify:web && bun scripts/release.ts --web
scripts.install:rust: cargo fetch --manifest-path apps/desktop/Cargo.toml && cargo fetch --manifest-path crates/vcam-driver/Cargo.toml
scripts.install:all: bun run install:root && bun run install:server && bun run install:web && bun run install:rust && bun run install:android
